name: enhance_image
description: Enhance, upscale, or vectorize an image using the MASYV Enhance Engine. Supports AI super-resolution (Real-ESRGAN), smart auto-detection of image type (photo/logo/text/illustration), and SVG vectorization. Returns the path to the enhanced output file.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the input image file

mode.description: Processing mode. 'smart' auto-detects image type and routes to the best pipeline. 'upscale' uses AI super-resolution. 'vectorize' converts to SVG. 'enhance' applies traditional image processing.

scale.description: Upscale factor (only used in upscale and smart modes)

output_path.description: Optional output path. Auto-generated if omitted (input_enhanced.ext).
Path to the enhanced output file

detected_type.description: Detected image type (only in smart mode)

mode_used.description: The processing mode that was applied
